notes: I've designed a lively, FigJam-inspired workshop page for you. The layout features an open, collaborative canvas with floating toolbars, sticky-note clusters, and active presence cursors to give it that tool-native, collaborative feel. I also included facilitation controls like a timer and voting to round out the workshop experience.
prompt: Design a Figma-inspired FigJam workshop page with sticky-note clusters, cursor presence, breakout templates, and facilitation controls around a large canvas. The page should feel lively, collaborative, and tool-native.
suggestions: Design a dark mode version of the canvas
Change the color of the cursors
title: FigJam Workshop Canvas
